package repository

import "context"

// RoleGroupsRepository is a draft repository boundary for roleGroups.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type RoleGroupsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query RoleGroupsQuery) ([]RoleGroup, error)
}

type RoleGroupsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
